chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3540 of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition 14.01.2020: None present for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General alongwith Mr. Raza Mian, DSP (Legal) and DSP Akbar ----------- The petitioner is admittedly a civil servant and is seeking direction against the respondents to consider his case for promotion. This being the position, the present petition is not maintainable as it is clearly barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petitioner and his counsel have remained absent on the last three dates of hearing and same is the position today. On the last date of hearing, counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court on the next date regarding maintainability of this petition. Despite the above direction, no one is present on behalf of the petitioner to assist the Court or to address the question of maintainability although the matter has been called twice since morning and name of the counsel has appeared in the cause list. In view of the above, the petition is dismissed with no order as to cost. J U D G E J U D G E Zahid/*
